generalCard.title: General Information
generalCard.description: Manage the organization's name, description, logo, website, and contact information.

brandingCard.title: Branding
brandingCard.description: Customize the workspace brand color and assistant identity shown to members.

header.fallbackDescription: Define how your organization is represented across workspace navigation, support surfaces, and member-facing experiences.

summary.title: Business Summary
summary.description: Keep this profile current so internal navigation, invitations, and support touchpoints remain consistent across the workspace.

logo.title: Organization logo
logo.description: Shown in workspace navigation, org selection, and identity surfaces across the dashboard.

identity.title: Identity details
identity.description: Keep the official name and description clean, clear, and aligned with how the organization is referenced internally.

contact.title: Contact and locale
contact.description: These details support administration, support routing, and organization-level communication.

placeholders.name: Acme Corp
placeholders.description: Summarize what your organization does and how teams use this workspace.

generalForm.footerNote: Changes here affect how the workspace is presented in internal navigation, member-facing pages, and support touchpoints.

logoUploader.uploadHint: Click the logo to upload one
logoUploader.replaceHint: Click the logo to replace it
logoUploader.requirements: PNG, JPG or WebP. Max 2 MB.
logoUploader.deleteHint: Hover the image to delete it.

toasts.fileTooLarge: Logo must be 2 MB or smaller.
toasts.uploadFailed: Failed to upload logo. Please try again.
toasts.removeFailed: Failed to remove logo. Please try again.
toasts.storageDeleteFailed: Logo removed from the workspace, but the storage file could not be deleted.

removeDialog.title: Delete organization logo?
removeDialog.description: This will remove the current logo from your workspace profile.
removeDialog.confirmNative: Delete organization logo? This will remove the current logo from your workspace profile.

color.title: Primary color
color.description: Used for the assistant header, sidebar accents, and action surfaces.

assistant.title: Assistant identity
assistant.description: Set the display name users see when they interact with the widget.

persona.title: Conversation style
persona.description: Choose the tone that best matches how your organization communicates with teams and members.

friendly.label: Friendly
friendly.description: Warm, approachable replies for employee support and onboarding.

professional.label: Professional
professional.description: Clear, formal communication suited for business operations.

concise.label: Concise
concise.description: Short, efficient responses for fast internal workflows.

brandingForm.footerNote: Branding changes affect the assistant widget appearance immediately after save.

brandingPreview.title: Live Preview
brandingPreview.description: Preview how the assistant will appear to users in a business-style support widget.

widget.subtitle: Workspace assistant
widget.userMessage: I need help finding the right workflow for a new request.

messages.friendly: Hello. I can help with onboarding, requests, and quick workspace guidance.
messages.professional: Welcome. I can assist with policies, requests, and operational support.
messages.concise: Hi. Ask about requests, policies, or workspace support.

validation.nameMax: Name must be at most 255 characters
validation.websiteMax: Website must be at most 500 characters
validation.websiteUrl: Website must be a valid URL
validation.emailMax: Email must be at most 255 characters
validation.emailFormat: Contact email must be a valid email address
validation.brandColorHex: Brand color must be a valid hex color (e.g. #3B82F6)
validation.botNameMax: Bot name must be at most 100 characters

workingTimePage.title: Working Time
workingTimePage.description: Configure standard working hours per weekday and manage holidays or special days.

organizationSettingsPage.title: Organization Settings
organizationSettingsPage.description: Configure KPI rules, digest settings, and periodic reporting automation for the organization.

kpiRules.title: KPI Rules
kpiRules.description: Manage KPI performance weights, overtime multipliers, and bonus rules for the organization.

periodicReports.title: Periodic Report Automation
periodicReports.description: Configure monthly, quarterly, and yearly report schedules, recipients, and exported scopes for the organization.

actions.editingNotice: Editing - changes are not saved until you click Save.
actions.viewOnlyNotice: View-only mode. Click Edit to make changes.

weights.title: KPI Performance Weights
weights.description: Controls how the performance score (0-100) is calculated for each team member. The three weights must sum to exactly 1.0.
weights.sumError: The three weights must add up to 1.0. Current sum: {sum}
weights.pointCompletionHint: Weight for the ratio of story points completed vs. total assigned.
weights.onTimeRateHint: Weight for the percentage of completed tasks finished on or before their deadline.
weights.otContributionHint: Weight for overtime hours (effective OT / expected working hours). Set to 0 to exclude OT.

ot.title: Overtime Multipliers
ot.description: Effective OT hours = actual hours x multiplier. Higher multipliers on weekends and holidays make those hours count more toward the KPI OT contribution score.
ot.weekdayHint: Standard rate for overtime on regular working days.
ot.saturdayHint: Multiplier applied to overtime hours worked on Saturdays.
ot.sundayHint: Multiplier applied to overtime hours worked on Sundays.
ot.publicHolidayHint: Multiplier for overtime on designated holidays or compensation days.

digest.title: KPI Digest Schedule
digest.description: Configure the weekly KPI digest. Time is in your organization's timezone (Asia/Saigon).
digest.enableHint: When enabled, a weekly KPI digest will be sent automatically on the configured day and time.
digest.dayHint: Day of the week to send the digest (1=Monday, 7=Sunday).
digest.timeHint: Time to send the digest (HH:MM, Asia/Saigon timezone).
digest.recipientGroupsHint: Groups that will receive the digest report.
digest.deliveryChannelsHint: How the digest will be delivered.

bonus.title: Bonus Rules
bonus.description: Optional bonus points added on top of the base performance score. Capped by Max Bonus Cap. Final score is always capped at 100.
bonus.enableHint: When disabled, no bonus points are added and all bonus fields below are ignored.
bonus.onTimeTaskHint: Points added for each task completed on or before its deadline.
bonus.earlyThresholdHint: A task must be finished this many hours before the deadline to qualify for the early bonus.
bonus.earlyTaskHint: Points added for each task completed at least the threshold hours before the deadline.
bonus.zeroOverdueHint: Bonus points awarded when a member has zero overdue tasks in the period.
bonus.maxCapHint: Maximum total bonus points that can be added to the base score.
bonus.otPerEffectiveHourHint: Points added for each effective overtime hour contributed.

header.title: Periodic Report Automation
header.editingNotice: Editing mode. Save to update periodic report automation for this organization.
header.reviewNotice: Review monthly, quarterly, and yearly report schedules for this organization.
header.viewOnlyNotice: View-only mode. You need manage permission to update periodic report settings.

schedules.title: Periodic Report Schedules
schedules.description: Configure the automatic monthly, quarterly, and yearly report schedule, recipients, channels, and exported scopes. Time is based on your organization timezone.
schedules.enableReportDescription: Turn automatic {frequency} scheduling on or off for this organization.

customEmails.hint: Press Enter or comma to add multiple custom email recipients.
customEmails.invalid: Enter a valid email address before adding it.
customEmails.invalidList: One or more custom email addresses are invalid.

monthly.label: Monthly
monthly.description: Send a report after each closed month.

quarterly.label: Quarterly
quarterly.description: Send a report after each closed quarter.

yearly.label: Yearly
yearly.description: Send a report after each closed year.

org_admin.label: Organization Admins
org_admin.description: Send to organization admins with access to reports.

project_manager.label: Project Managers
project_manager.description: Send to project managers across the organization.

project_owner.label: Project Owner
project_owner.description: Send to the current project owner.

contact_email.label: Contact Email
contact_email.description: Include the organization contact email recipients configured for this workspace.

org_summary.label: Organization Summary
org_summary.description: High-level organization summary exported as CSV.

member_kpi.label: Member KPI
member_kpi.description: Member KPI breakdown for the selected reporting period.

email.label: Email
email.description: Send reports to recipient email addresses.

in_app.label: In-App Notification
in_app.description: Create in-app notifications for recipients mapped to system users.

actions.editingNotice: Editing. Changes are not saved until you click Save.
actions.viewOnlyNotice: View-only mode. Click Edit to make changes.

card.title: Standard Working Hours per Day
card.description: Configure how many hours each weekday counts as a standard working day. These values are used to calculate expected hours for KPI and to determine when overtime starts. Set weekend days to 0 if the organization does not work those days.
card.totalWeekTooltip: Total standard hours across all 7 days.

validation.nameMax: Name must be 255 characters or fewer.
validation.workingHoursRange: Working hours must be between 0 and 24.

card.title: Holidays & Special Days
card.tooltip: Holidays override the standard working hours for that date when calculating expected hours and OT multipliers for KPI.
card.description: Specific dates that override the standard weekly schedule. A working hours value of 0 means a full day off.

dialog.yearHint: Holiday will be saved for {year}. You only need to choose month and day.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.namePlaceholder: e.g. New Year's Day, Tet Holiday...
dialog.workingHoursTooltip: Set to 0 for a full day off. Use 4 for a half-day. This overrides the standard schedule for this specific date.

deleteDialog.title: Remove Holiday?
deleteDialog.description: This date will revert to the standard weekly schedule for KPI calculations.

table.name: Name
table.empty: No holidays configured. Click Add Holiday to get started.
